message:
Fix issues #18, #19, #20: pid/info, fullpage screenshot, HiDPI fix

Issue #18 — Add getChromePid() and chrome-ws pid/info commands:
- getChromePid() exported from chrome-ws-lib (returns null when not running)
- getBrowserMode() now includes pid field
- CLI: `chrome-ws pid` prints Chrome PID for X11 window management
- CLI: `chrome-ws info` prints JSON with pid/port/mode/profile from meta.json

Issue #19 — Add fullpage screenshot support:
- screenshot() accepts new fullPage=false parameter
- fullPage=true: uses Page.getLayoutMetrics contentSize + captureBeyondViewport:true
- MCP: screenshot action accepts optional fullpage boolean
- CLI: chrome-ws screenshot supports --fullpage flag

Issue #20 — Fix HiDPI screenshot sizing on Linux:
- Viewport screenshots (no selector) now use explicit clip from window.innerWidth/
  innerHeight instead of letting Chrome pick DPI-scaled dimensions
- All screenshots now pass fromSurface:true for consistent output
- Closes #20

TDD: 15 new tests added (test-issue-18-pid.cjs, test-issue-19-fullpage.cjs,
test-issue-20-hidpi.cjs), all passing. Existing 19 tests unaffected.
